## Experience summary

8+ years building high-traffic, regulated web systems across fintech (PCI-DSS), healthcare (DICOM/FHIR), e-commerce, and edtech.

Current employer: Betsson Group (fintech, cashier/payments platform, PCI-DSS scope)
Previous: Canon Medical Systems, CICCC, Grupo SBF (Nike Brazil), Encora, Zup Innovation, Venturus, MB Labs

## Core stack

Angular · React · Next.js · TypeScript · RxJS · NgRx · Node.js · Docker · AWS · GitHub Actions
